roles.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
roles.summary: Build and own production systems that run hospitals, refineries, and exchanges. You'll ship end-to-end features in React + Node/Laravel and pair with architects to evolve our platform standards.
responsibilities: Design and ship production features in React + Node/Laravel
Own end-to-end delivery of mission-critical modules
Pair with architects to evolve platform standards
Code review and mentor mid-level engineers
requirements: Strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js (or PHP/Laravel)
Comfort with cloud infra (AWS or Azure)
Bias toward simple, observable, well-tested systems

roles.title: Solution Architect
roles.summary: Lead architecture for multi-year enterprise programs. Translate ambiguous business problems into clear, defensible technical designs across cloud, data, and integration.
responsibilities: Lead architecture for multi-year enterprise programs
Run discovery, design reviews, and technical workshops with clients
Define non-functional requirements: scale, security, compliance, observability
Set platform standards and shepherd them through delivery
requirements: 8+ years in software engineering with 3+ as architect
Deep cloud experience (AWS or Azure) at enterprise scale
Experience in regulated industries (healthcare, finance, energy, gov)
Strong written and verbal communication with executive audiences

roles.title: DevOps / SRE Engineer
roles.summary: Own the reliability and delivery pipelines for systems where downtime is not an option. Build the platform that engineers ship on every day.
responsibilities: Design and operate CI/CD pipelines across multiple client environments
Own observability: metrics, logs, traces, alerts, runbooks
Lead incident response and post-incident reviews
Harden production: SLOs, error budgets, security baselines
requirements: 5+ years in DevOps, SRE, or platform engineering
Production experience with Kubernetes, Terraform, and at least one major cloud
Strong scripting (Python or Go) and Linux fundamentals
Experience with regulated workloads is a plus

roles.title: AI / ML Engineer
roles.summary: Design and ship LLM-powered features that hold up in production: RAG pipelines, evaluation harnesses, and agentic workflows for enterprise systems.
responsibilities: Design RAG and retrieval pipelines over private enterprise data
Build evaluation harnesses and quality gates for LLM features
Productionize agentic workflows with proper guardrails and observability
Collaborate with platform engineers on cost and latency
requirements: Production experience shipping LLM features end-to-end
Comfort with Python, vector stores, and at least one major LLM SDK
Healthy skepticism about model output and clear thinking on guardrails
